Home / Fortnite / Cosmetics / Item Shop Bundles / Item Shop Bundles

Item Shop Bundles

Overview

Item Shop Bundles (not to be confused with Limited Time Offers) are Bundles that consist of cosmetics that are found within the Item Shop. They, unlike Limited Time Offers, aren’t required to be purchased if you want the cosmetic. They usually give a discount on already existing cosmetics, or, simply act as bundles for you to purchase (similar to Limited Time Offers).
